title: Daoist Canon: Zuowang Lun (Sitting in Forgetfulness) (Section 7)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Zuowang Lun (Sitting in Forgetfulness)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Zuowang Lun (Sitting in Forgetfulness)

translation.text: From the Zuowang Lun (Sitting in Forgetfulness) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
